basic_details.short_information: NSIC Venture Capital Fund (NVCFL) Advisor Notification 2026 has been released on 02 July 2026 on the official website of NVCFL. A total of 01 vacancy has been announced through the NVCFL Advisor Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate with Two year full-time MBA / Post Graduate Diploma in Management, 25 years+ experience in AIFs / Venture Capital industry
qualification.details: Graduate with Two year full-time MBA / Post Graduate Diploma in Management and 25 years+ experience in AIFs / Venture Capital industry (at least 5 years in Fund Management/Investment Banking/Start up Funding and 3 years at Top Management/CEO level)

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 13-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download NVCFL Advisor Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download NVCFL Advisor Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.nsic_venture_capital_fund: Graduate with Two year full-time MBA / Post Graduate Diploma in Management, 25 years+ experience in AIFs / Venture Capital industry

content_sections.heading: NVCFL Advisor Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NVCFL Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NVCFL Advisor Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Graduate with Two year full-time MBA / Post Graduate Diploma in Management and 25 years+ experience in AIFs / Venture Capital industry (at least 5 years in Fund Management/Investment Banking/Start up Funding and 3 years at Top Management/CEO level)

rows.event: Last Date for Receipt of Applications

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 13-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NVCFL Advisor recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 13th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Advisor post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Advisor position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 4.00 Lakh per month.

faq.question: Q3. What are the minimum educational qualifications required?
faq.answer: Candidates must be a Graduate with a Two-year full-time MBA or Post Graduate Diploma in Management.

faq.question: Q4. How many years of experience are needed for the Advisor role?
faq.answer: A minimum of 25 years of experience in AIFs or the Venture Capital industry is required, with specific experience in Fund Management, Investment Banking, or Start-up Funding, and at the Top Management/CEO level.

faq.question: Q5. What is the maximum age limit for applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 61 years.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. How will candidates be selected for the Advisor post?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an Interaction/Interview conducted by a Selection Committee.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email only.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of Advisor is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the NSIC Venture Capital Fund located?
faq.answer: The NSIC Venture Capital Fund is located in New Delhi, Delhi, with a pincode of 110020.
